message:
feat(config): Redis config-file parser + fuzz_config_file + conformance

Adds a structured parser for Redis-style config files to fr-config,
along with a dedicated fuzz target and a conformance matrix in
fr-conformance that pins the parser to loadServerConfigFromString /
sdssplitargs semantics byte-for-byte.

crates/fr-config/src/lib.rs:

- New ParsedConfigFile + ParsedConfigDirective datatypes. Each
  directive records its 1-based line number, a lowercase directive
  name, and the argument byte-slices.
- ConfigFileParseError + ConfigFileParseErrorReason (currently only
  InvalidQuotedToken) with a reason_code() -> &'static str so
  downstream tooling can match machine-readable codes rather than
  English sentences. Display impl carries "{code} at line {n}:
  unbalanced quotes or quote followed by non-whitespace".
- parse_redis_config + parse_redis_config_bytes (the &str / &[u8]
  pair) walk the input line by line, strip CRLF, skip blanks /
  full-line comments, and tokenise the remaining content through
  split_config_line_args / split_config_line_args_bytes. Handles:
  * Double-quoted args with \xHH hex escapes, \n \r \t \b \a \\ \"
    escapes.
  * Single-quoted args with \' literal-escape and no other escape
    processing (matches Redis' sdssplitargs single-quote rule).
  * Bare tokens terminated by whitespace.
  * Inline "#" comments are *not* stripped inside quoted strings -
    this is Redis behaviour that users rely on for rename-command
    "CONFIG" "" style lines.
  * \x0b / \x0c style whitespace + leading whitespace before a
    directive both accepted.
- split_config_line_args / _bytes are exposed as building blocks
  that higher-level callers (and the fuzzer) can use directly.

crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs:

- redis_config_file_parser_conformance_matrix: feeds a multi-line
  config with full-line comments, mixed EOL, rename-command with
  empty-quoted arg, notify-keyspace-events with hex + escape mix,
  requirepass with single-quote \' escape, appendonly + inline
  comment, and \x0b-prefixed "dir" directive - and asserts the
  parsed directive list matches the expected six entries with
  correct lowercase names and argument bytes. Also covers
  InvalidQuotedToken cases (\"unterminated, trailing quote-after-
  text) and asserts reason_code() returns
  "configfile.invalid_quoted_token".

fuzz/Cargo.toml + fuzz/README.md:

- Registers fuzz_config_file as a new [[bin]] and documents it in
  the target table alongside the existing parsers.

fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_config_file.rs:

- libfuzzer target with a two-arm arbitrary enum: Raw(Vec<u8>)
  drives parse_redis_config_bytes / split_config_line_args_bytes
  on random bytes, and Structured exercises StructuredConfigFile /
  StructuredConfigLine / StructuredToken to synthesise realistic
  directive / bare / SingleQuoted / DoubleQuoted input. MAX_INPUT_
  LEN, MAX_LINES, MAX_ARGS, and MAX_TOKEN_LEN keep fuzz throughput
  high while still exercising the tokenisation corners.

fuzz/corpus/fuzz_config_file/:

- basic.conf, include.conf, invalid_quote.conf, quoted.conf -
  minimal seed corpus so the fuzzer starts with realistic shapes
  instead of purely random bytes.

files.patch:
@@ -186,3 +186,10 @@ path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_eventloop_validators.rs"
 test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_config_file"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_config_file.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false

@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ This directory contains fuzz targets for security-critical parser surfaces.
 | `fuzz_migrate_request` | `MIGRATE` request parsing | Structure-aware option-matrix validation + canonical argv round-trip |
 | `fuzz_keyspace_events` | `notify-keyspace-events` config parsing | Structure-aware flag-model validation + canonical string round-trip |
 | `fuzz_eventloop_validators` | Event-loop planning and validator invariants | Structure-aware state-machine/model checks + raw phase-trace replay |
+| `fuzz_config_file` | Redis config file tokenization | Structure-aware directive parsing + raw quoted-token hardening |
 
 ## Running Fuzz Tests
 
@@ -74,6 +75,9 @@ cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_keyspace_events
 # Run event-loop validator/state-machine fuzzer
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_eventloop_validators
 
+# Run Redis config file parser fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_config_file
+
 # Run round-trip invariant checker
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_resp_roundtrip
 ```
